title: Aila Aila Lyrics I Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Aila Aila
Singers: Aditya Rao, Nattiella Di Lucco
Music: AR Rahman
Movie: I
Lyrics: Karky

Aila aila I, Aila aila I
Aila aila I, Aila aila I
Man in vennila

Un pidiyile en uyirum irukka
or urasalil en vergal silirkka
ennil muttakalil koidhaai

Kaalai undhan muththahil vidiyum
naalum unnil thappadhu mudiyum
nee enai menmai seidhaai.

enadhu romaney, siridhu kieeravaa
vizhiyil koorinen, manadhai koora vaa
mugaththai moodiye thirudipoga vaa
neengaadhe, en romane ..

Aila aila I, Aila aila I
Aila aila I, Aila aila I
Man in vennila

konjam konjamaai enai pidhukki
aila aila eduppaayaa.
Thoorigayile enai kiduthi
vinmeengal vellai adippaayaa.

Thuppu thulakka varuvaayaa
muththa sidharalgal hoyaa.
poo illaamal aila
vaasama ooyaa.
nee ingu siruthu vittayaa
adhanaalaa.

Marupadi sirithidida
nilavugal kudhithida
boomiengilum oli.
ini MInasaram panjam
theerpom siru thuli.

Undhan meni engilum enai eduthu
aila aila nee poosa
etti paarththidum kaakkaigalum
kannai moodumey koosa

vaanin vilumbile heyaa
ilamsivappai hoyaa
roja poovil aila
vannaththai
nilavinil saliththeduppen
unakkaaga.

Sarmaththin milirvinil olirvinil
therivadhu dhevadheigalin thiral.
Un keley pookkum vin pookkal
pookkal illa nizhal.

Sakkai ena vaanaththai pizhindhu
indhu kadalin aalaththai kadandhu
naan en kangal kondaen.
aila vizhi neelathai irakki
aandhai ena un marbil uduthu
pei veri unnil kandaen.

idhalil valiyile
noolgal parikkavaa
kadhal thariyile naanum urikkava
pariththi thiriyile
porigal theriikkavaa

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

Who composed the music for the song Aila Aila?

The music for the song was composed by the legendary musician AR Rahman.

Which movie features the song Aila Aila?

The song is featured in the Tamil movie I, released in 2015.

Who are the lead actors in the movie I?

The lead roles in the movie were played by Vikram and Amy Jackson.

What is the theme of the song Aila Aila?

The song is a vibrant and romantic number with energetic beats and captivating lyrics.

Who wrote the lyrics for Aila Aila?

The lyrics were penned by the talented lyricist Karky.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Aila Aila from the movie I, released in 2015, features the lead actors Vikram and Amy Jackson. Composed by AR Rahman and penned by Karky, this duet is performed by Aditya Rao and Nattiella Di Lucco. The track is a blend of romantic and energetic elements, reflecting the vibrant emotions of the characters in the film. Its dynamic rhythm and captivating lyrics make it a memorable addition to the movie's soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Aila Aila from the movie I is a vibrant and captivating track that showcases the musical brilliance of AR Rahman. Sung by Aditya Rao and Nattiella Di Lucco, the song blends energetic beats with romantic undertones, creating a unique auditory experience. The collaboration of Vikram and Amy Jackson in the visually stunning movie adds to the charm of this unforgettable number.
stanzaMeanings: Aila Aila I, Aila Aila I, Aila Aila I, Aila Aila I, Man in the moon.
Aila Aila I, Aila Aila I, Aila Aila I, Aila Aila I, Man in the moon.
In your embrace, my life exists, and in a dream, my worries fade away.
In the morning, your pearls will shine, and in you, nothing can go wrong, you have made me truthful.
My beloved, I have expressed my feelings through my eyes, don't steal my heart by closing your face.
Aila Aila I, Aila Aila I, Aila Aila I, Aila Aila I, Man in the moon.
Aila Aila Aila, Aila Aila Aila.
Slowly, slowly, you are pulling me in, Aila Aila, are you taking me away? In the sky, you have thrown me, like a white feather.
The rain will come, the pearls will fall. Without flowers, the fragrance will spread. You have left me smiling here because of that.
The moon will shine again, and the earth will echo. Now, we will end the worries of the world with small drops.
If your beauty takes me, Aila Aila, you will see the crows closing their eyes.
In the sky, I will capture the beauty of the little flower, and I will bring the color of the moon for you.
In the light of joy, in the glow of brightness, the divine will reveal. Your call will bloom like flowers, but there is no shadow.
I have crossed the sky, broken the ocean's waves, and I have captured my dreams. Aila, with your blue eyes, I have seen the ghost of my desires in you.
In this, there are no threads to bind love, and I too will not be bound by it, wandering in the open, I will find my way.
